title: Quick List of my Projects
subtitle: Projects I've been working on and their status
content:
##   Occasionally Active:

###  ﻿ [E﻿E](https://github.com/anoraktrend/ee-fbsd)

  EE is a terminal based editor that uses (n)curses. It's a simplified text editor that is (as of this writing) available with various free UNIX distributions (FreeBSD and Linux). I occasionally maintain this as an extraction from freebsd.

![](/images/uploads/r.png "EE in action")

 ﻿ [AEE](https://github.com/anoraktrend/aee)

  AEE is a superset of 'ee', a simplified text editor that is (as of this writing) available with various free UNIX distributions (FreeBSD and Linux). I'm working on updating the documentation and build system to use with modern linux distros like Alpine and Chimera.

![](/images/uploads/aee_005.png "AEE in action")

###  ﻿ [Berkeley Artistic License](https://github.com/anoraktrend/Berkeley-Artistic)

  This is a License that I made as a means of creating a more legible, correct, and up to date variation of Artistic License V1, that has been conformed to my personal interpretation of the BSD, (Berkeley), style. It is currently undergoing major maintenance to be approved of by OSI, after which I may also submit it to the FSF for approval as a Free license.

##   Archived:

###  ﻿ [Kinland](https://kinland.helltop.net)

![](/images/uploads/2024-11-11-08.07.02-kinland.helltop.net-3eeaeeefa124.png "a screenshot of the website for Kinland")

K﻿inland was an unfiction project I made as a birthday and anniversary gift to my fiancée. I have it archived here for posterity.
